generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum Role {
  USER
  ADMIN
}

enum Category {
  AI
  CTDL
  WEB_DEV
  DEVOPS
  MOBILE
}

model User {
  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
  email        String   @unique
  passwordHash String
  name         String
  role         Role     @default(USER)
  avatar       String?
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  articles      Article[]
  comments      Comment[]
  rooms         StudyRoom[]
  refreshTokens RefreshToken[]

  @@map("users")
}

model Article {
  id          String    @id @default(uuid())
  slug        String    @unique
  title       String
  excerpt     String
  content     String    @db.Text
  category    Category
  tags        String[]
  authorId    String
  coverImage  String?
  readingTime Int       @default(5)
  published   Boolean   @default(false)
  publishedAt DateTime?
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt

  author   User      @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
  comments Comment[]

  @@map("articles")
}

model Comment {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  articleId   String
  authorId    String?
  authorName  String
  content     String   @db.Text
  parentId    String?
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  article  Article  @relation(fields: [articleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  author   User?    @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
  parent   Comment? @relation("CommentReplies", fields: [parentId], references: [id])
  replies  Comment[] @relation("CommentReplies")

  @@map("comments")
}

model Newsletter {
  id           String    @id @default(uuid())
  email        String    @unique
  subscribed   Boolean   @default(true)
  subscribedAt DateTime  @default(now())
  unsubscribedAt DateTime?
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())

  @@map("newsletters")
}

model StudyRoom {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  code      String   @unique
  name      String
  creatorId String
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  expiresAt DateTime?

  creator User @relation(fields: [creatorId], references: [id])

const envSchema = z.object({
  DATABASE_URL: z.string().url(),
  JWT_SECRET: z.string().min(32),
  JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: z.string().min(32),
  CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME: z.string(),
  CLOUDINARY_API_KEY: z.string(),
  CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET: z.string(),
  PORT: z.coerce.number().default(4000),
  FRONTEND_URL: z.string().url().default('http://localhost:3000'),
  NODE_ENV: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),
})

export const config = envSchema.parse(process.env)

export type EnvConfig = z.infer<typeof envSchema>

import mongoose, { Document, Schema } from 'mongoose'

export enum Category {
  AI = 'AI',
  CTDL = 'CTDL',
  WEB_DEV = 'WEB_DEV',
  DEVOPS = 'DEVOPS',
  MOBILE = 'MOBILE',
}

export interface IArticle extends Document {
  _id: mongoose.Types.ObjectId
  slug: string
  title: string
  excerpt: string
  content: string
  category: Category
  tags: string[]
  authorId: mongoose.Types.ObjectId
  coverImage?: string
  readingTime: number
  published: boolean
  publishedAt?: Date
  createdAt: Date
  updatedAt: Date
}

const articleSchema = new Schema<IArticle>(
  {
    slug: { type: String, required: true, unique: true },
    title: { type: String, required: true },
    excerpt: { type: String, required: true },
    content: { type: String, required: true },
    category: { type: String, enum: Object.values(Category), required: true },
    tags: [{ type: String }],
    authorId: { type: Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User', required: true },
    coverImage: { type: String, default: null },
    readingTime: { type: Number, default: 5 },
    published: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    publishedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
  },
  { timestamps: true }
)

// Index for search
articleSchema.index({ title: 'text', excerpt: 'text' })

export const Article = mongoose.model<IArticle>('Article', articleSchema)

export { StudyRoom } from './StudyRoom.js'

import mongoose from 'mongoose'
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
import dotenv from 'dotenv'
import { User, Role } from '../src/models/User.js'
import { Newsletter } from '../src/models/Newsletter.js'
import { RefreshToken } from '../src/models/RefreshToken.js'

dotenv.config({ path: '.env' })

const MONGODB_URI = process.env.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/maiy_tech_hub'

async function seed() {
  console.log('🔌 Connecting to MongoDB...')
  await mongoose.connect(MONGODB_URI)
  console.log('✅ Connected to MongoDB')

  // Clear existing data
  await User.deleteMany({})
  await Newsletter.deleteMany({})
  await RefreshToken.deleteMany({})
  console.log('🗑️  Cleared existing data')

  // Create admin user
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash('maiy2026', 12)

  const admin = await User.create({
    email: 'admin@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash,
    name: 'MAIY Admin',
    role: Role.ADMIN,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Admin user created: ${admin.email} (password: maiy2026)`)

  // Create test user
  const testUser = await User.create({
    email: 'test@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash: await bcrypt.hash('test1234', 12),
    name: 'Test User',
    role: Role.USER,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Test user created: ${testUser.email} (password: test1234)`)

  // Create test newsletter
  await Newsletter.create({ email: 'user@example.com' })
  console.log('✅ Test newsletter created')

  await mongoose.disconnect()
  console.log('🔌 Disconnected from MongoDB')
  console.log('🎉 Seeding complete!')
}

seed().catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ Seeding failed:', err)
  process.exit(1)
})

import mongoose, { Document, Schema } from 'mongoose'

export enum Category {
  AI = 'AI',
  CTDL = 'CTDL',
  WEB_DEV = 'WEB_DEV',
  DEVOPS = 'DEVOPS',
  MOBILE = 'MOBILE',
}

export interface IArticle extends Document {
  _id: mongoose.Types.ObjectId
  slug: string
  title: string
  excerpt: string
  content: string
  category: Category
  tags: string[]
  authorId: mongoose.Types.ObjectId
  coverImage?: string
  readingTime: number
  published: boolean
  publishedAt?: Date
  createdAt: Date
  updatedAt: Date
}

const articleSchema = new Schema<IArticle>(
  {
    slug: { type: String, required: true, unique: true },
    title: { type: String, required: true },
    excerpt: { type: String, required: true },
    content: { type: String, required: true },
    category: { type: String, enum: Object.values(Category), required: true },
    tags: [{ type: String }],
    authorId: { type: Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User', required: true },
    coverImage: { type: String, default: null },
    readingTime: { type: Number, default: 5 },
    published: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    publishedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
  },
  { timestamps: true }
)

articleSchema.index({ title: 'text', excerpt: 'text' })

export const Article = mongoose.model<IArticle>('Article', articleSchema)

export { User, Role } from './User.js'
export { Article, Category } from './Article.js'
export { Comment } from './Comment.js'
export { Newsletter } from './Newsletter.js'
export { StudyRoom } from './StudyRoom.js'
export { RefreshToken } from './RefreshToken.js'

import mongoose from 'mongoose'
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
import dotenv from 'dotenv'

import { Newsletter } from '../src/models/Newsletter.js'
import { RefreshToken } from '../src/models/RefreshToken.js'

dotenv.config({ path: '.env' })

const MONGODB_URL = process.env.MONGODB_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/maiy_tech_hub'

async function seed() {
  console.log('🔌 Connecting to MongoDB...')
  await mongoose.connect(MONGODB_URL)
  console.log('✅ Connected to MongoDB')

  // Clear existing data
  await User.deleteMany({})
  await Newsletter.deleteMany({})
  await RefreshToken.deleteMany({})
  console.log('🗑️  Cleared existing data')

  // Create admin user
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash('maiy2026', 12)

  const admin = await User.create({
    email: 'admin@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash,
    name: 'MAIY Admin',
    role: Role.ADMIN,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Admin user created: ${admin.email} (password: maiy2026)`)

  // Create test user
  const testUser = await User.create({
    email: 'test@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash: await bcrypt.hash('test1234', 12),
    name: 'Test User',
    role: Role.USER,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Test user created: ${testUser.email} (password: test1234)`)

  // Create test newsletter
  await Newsletter.create({ email: 'user@example.com' })
  console.log('✅ Test newsletter created')

  await mongoose.disconnect()
  console.log('🔌 Disconnected from MongoDB')
  console.log('🎉 Seeding complete!')
}

seed().catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ Seeding failed:', err)
  process.exit(1)
})

version: '3.8'

services:
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7
    container_name: maiy-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: maiy_tech_hub
    ports:
      - "27017:27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mongosh", "--eval", "db.adminCommand('ping')"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s

  backend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: maiy-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "4000:4000"
    environment:
      MONGODB_URL: "mongodb://mongodb:27017/maiy_tech_hub"
      JWT_SECRET: "${JWT_SECRET}"
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: "${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET}"
      CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME: "${CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME}"
      CLOUDINARY_API_KEY: "${CLOUDINARY_API_KEY}"
      CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET: "${CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET}"
      PORT: 4000
      FRONTEND_URL: "${FRONTEND_URL:-http://localhost:3000}"
      NODE_ENV: production
    depends_on:
      mongodb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:4000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 40s

volumes:
  mongodb_data:

import { z } from 'zod'

const envSchema = z.object({
  MONGODB_URL: z.string().default('mongodb://localhost:27017/maiy_tech_hub'),
  JWT_SECRET: z.string().default('test-jwt-secret-key-for-testing-purposes-only'),
  JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: z.string().default('test-refresh-secret-key-for-testing-purposes-only'),
  CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME: z.string().default('test-cloud'),
  CLOUDINARY_API_KEY: z.string().default('test-key'),
  CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET: z.string().default('test-secret'),
  PORT: z.coerce.number().default(4000),
  FRONTEND_URL: z.string().url().default('http://localhost:3000'),
  NODE_ENV: z.enum(['development', 'production', 'test']).default('development'),
})

export const config = envSchema.parse(process.env)

export type EnvConfig = z.infer<typeof envSchema>

version: '3.8'

services:
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7
    container_name: maiy-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: maiy_tech_hub
    ports:
      - "27017:27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mongosh", "--eval", "db.adminCommand('ping')"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s

  backend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: maiy-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "4000:4000"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: "mongodb://mongodb:27017/maiy_tech_hub"
      JWT_SECRET: "${JWT_SECRET}"
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: "${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET}"
      CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME: "${CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME}"
      CLOUDINARY_API_KEY: "${CLOUDINARY_API_KEY}"
      CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET: "${CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET}"
      PORT: 4000
      FRONTEND_URL: "${FRONTEND_URL:-http://localhost:3000}"
      NODE_ENV: production
    depends_on:
      mongodb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:4000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 40s

volumes:

import mongoose from 'mongoose'
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
import dotenv from 'dotenv'
import { User, Role } from '../src/models/User.js'
import { Newsletter } from '../src/models/Newsletter.js'
import { RefreshToken } from '../src/models/RefreshToken.js'

dotenv.config({ path: '.env' })

const DATABASE_URL = process.env.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/maiy_tech_hub'

async function seed() {
  console.log('🔌 Connecting to MongoDB...')
  await mongoose.connect(DATABASE_URL)
  console.log('✅ Connected to MongoDB')

  // Clear existing data
  await User.deleteMany({})
  await Newsletter.deleteMany({})
  await RefreshToken.deleteMany({})
  console.log('🗑️  Cleared existing data')

  // Create admin user
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash('maiy2026', 12)

  const admin = await User.create({
    email: 'admin@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash,
    name: 'MAIY Admin',
    role: Role.ADMIN,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Admin user created: ${admin.email} (password: maiy2026)`)

  // Create test user
  const testUser = await User.create({
    email: 'test@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash: await bcrypt.hash('test1234', 12),
    name: 'Test User',
    role: Role.USER,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Test user created: ${testUser.email} (password: test1234)`)

  // Create test newsletter
  await Newsletter.create({ email: 'user@example.com' })
  console.log('✅ Test newsletter created')

  await mongoose.disconnect()
  console.log('🔌 Disconnected from MongoDB')
  console.log('🎉 Seeding complete!')
}

seed().catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ Seeding failed:', err)
  process.exit(1)
})

import mongoose from 'mongoose'
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
import dotenv from 'dotenv'
import { User, Role } from '../src/models/User.js'
import { Newsletter } from '../src/models/Newsletter.js'
import { RefreshToken } from '../src/models/RefreshToken.js'

dotenv.config({ path: '.env' })

const DATABASE_URL = process.env.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/maiy_tech_hub'

async function seed() {
  console.log('🔌 Connecting to MongoDB...')
  await mongoose.connect(DATABASE_URL)
  console.log('✅ Connected to MongoDB')

  // Clear existing data
  await User.deleteMany({})
  await Newsletter.deleteMany({})
  await RefreshToken.deleteMany({})
  console.log('🗑️  Cleared existing data')

  // Create admin user
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash('maiy2026', 12)

  const admin = await User.create({
    email: 'admin@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash,
    name: 'MAIY Admin',
    role: Role.ADMIN,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Admin user created: ${admin.email} (password: maiy2026)`)

  // Create test user
  const testUser = await User.create({
    email: 'test@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash: await bcrypt.hash('test1234', 12),
    name: 'Test User',
    role: Role.USER,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Test user created: ${testUser.email} (password: test1234)`)

  // Create test newsletter
  await Newsletter.create({ email: 'user@example.com' })
  console.log('✅ Test newsletter created')

  await mongoose.disconnect()
  console.log('🔌 Disconnected from MongoDB')
  console.log('🎉 Seeding complete!')
}

seed().catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ Seeding failed:', err)
  process.exit(1)
})

version: '3.8'

services:
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7
    container_name: maiy-mongodb
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: maiy_tech_hub
    ports:
      - "27017:27017"
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mongosh", "--eval", "db.adminCommand('ping')"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s

  backend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: maiy-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "4000:4000"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: "mongodb://mongodb:27017/maiy_tech_hub"
      JWT_SECRET: "${JWT_SECRET}"
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: "${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET}"
      CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME: "${CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME}"
      CLOUDINARY_API_KEY: "${CLOUDINARY_API_KEY}"
      CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET: "${CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET}"
      PORT: 4000
      FRONTEND_URL: "${FRONTEND_URL:-http://localhost:3000}"
      NODE_ENV: production
    depends_on:
      mongodb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:4000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 40s

volumes:
  mongodb_data:

arguments.content:
# MAIY Tech Hub Backend API

## Base URL
```
http://localhost:4000
```

## Authentication

### JWT Flow
1. Register/Login to get `accessToken` (15 min) and `refreshToken` (7 days)
2. Use `accessToken` in `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
3. Refresh via `/api/auth/refresh` when expired

### Auth Headers
```http
Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>
Content-Type: application/json
```

---

## Endpoints

### 🔐 Auth Routes (`/api/auth`)

#### POST /register
Register a new user.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "name": "User Name"
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "name": "User Name",
    "role": "USER"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."
}
```

#### POST /login
Login with credentials.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "password123"
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "user": {
    "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "name": "User Name",
    "role": "USER"
  },
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...",
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."
}
```

**Error (401):**
```json
{ "error": "Invalid credentials" }
```

#### POST /refresh
Refresh access token.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."
}
```

#### POST /logout
Logout and invalidate refresh token.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "refreshToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs..."
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{ "message": "Logged out successfully" }
```

---

### 📝 Articles Routes (`/api/articles`)

#### GET /
List published articles with pagination.

**Query Parameters:**
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | 1 | Page number |
| limit | number | 10 | Items per page (max 100) |
| category | string | - | Filter: AI, CTDL, WEB_DEV, DEVOPS, MOBILE |
| tag | string | - | Filter by tag |
| search | string | - | Search in title/excerpt |

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "articles": [
    {
      "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1",
      "slug": "intro-to-typescript",
      "title": "Introduction to TypeScript",
      "excerpt": "Learn TypeScript basics...",
      "category": "WEB_DEV",
      "tags": ["typescript", "javascript"],
      "coverImage": "https://...",
      "readingTime": 5,
      "published": true,
      "publishedAt": "2024-03-15T10:00:00Z",
      "author": {
        "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d2",
        "name": "Author Name",
        "avatar": "https://..."
      }
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 25,
    "totalPages": 3
  }
}
```

#### GET /:slug
Get single article by slug.

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1",
  "slug": "intro-to-typescript",
  "title": "Introduction to TypeScript",
  "content": "Full article content...",
  "category": "WEB_DEV",
  "tags": ["typescript", "javascript"],
  "author": { ... },
  "published": true,
  "publishedAt": "2024-03-15T10:00:00Z"
}
```

**Error (404):**
```json
{ "error": "Article not found" }
```

#### POST / (Admin only)
Create new article.

**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

**Request:**
```json
{
  "slug": "my-new-article",
  "title": "My New Article",
  "excerpt": "Short description",
  "content": "Full article content...",
  "category": "AI",
  "tags": ["ai", "ml"],
  "coverImage": "https://...",
  "readingTime": 10
}
```

**Response (201):** Created article object

**Error (403):**
```json
{ "error": "Admin only" }
```

#### PUT /:id (Admin only)
Update article.

**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

#### DELETE /:id (Admin only)
Delete article.

**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

**Response (200):**
```json
{ "message": "Article deleted" }
```

#### PATCH /:id/publish (Admin only)
Publish/unpublish article.

**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

**Request:**
```json
{ "published": true }
```

---

### 💬 Comments Routes (`/api`)

#### GET /articles/:slug/comments
Get comments for an article.

**Response (200):**
```json
[
  {
    "_id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d3",
    "content": "Great article!",
    "authorName": "John Doe",
    "author": {
      "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d2",
      "name": "John Doe",
      "avatar": "https://..."
    },
    "replies": [
      {
        "_id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d4",
        "content": "Thanks!",
        "authorName": "Author",
        "author": { ... }
      }
    ],
    "createdAt": "2024-03-15T12:00:00Z"
  }
]
```

#### POST /articles/:slug/comments
Add comment to article.

**Headers (optional):** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

**Request:**
```json
{
  "content": "My comment",
  "authorName": "Anonymous User",
  "parentId": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d3"
}
```

**Response (201):** Created comment object

#### DELETE /comments/:id
Delete comment.

**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (must be author or admin)

**Response (200):**
```json
{ "message": "Comment deleted" }
```

---

### 📧 Newsletter Routes (`/api/newsletter`)

#### POST /subscribe
Subscribe to newsletter.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "email": "subscriber@example.com"
}
```

**Response (201):**
```json
{ "message": "Subscribed successfully" }
```

**Error (400):**
```json
{ "error": "Already subscribed" }
```

#### POST /unsubscribe
Unsubscribe from newsletter.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "email": "subscriber@example.com"
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{ "message": "Unsubscribed successfully" }
```

#### GET /stats (Admin only)
Get newsletter statistics.

**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "total": 150,
  "subscribed": 120,
  "unsubscribed": 30
}
```

---

### 📚 Study Rooms Routes (`/api/rooms`)

#### POST /create (Auth required)
Create a new study room.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "name": "CS101 Study Group"
}
```

**Response (201):**
```json
{
  "_id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d5",
  "code": "ABC123",
  "name": "CS101 Study Group",
  "creator": {
    "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d2",
    "name": "Creator Name"
  },
  "isActive": true,
  "expiresAt": "2024-03-15T16:00:00Z"
}
```

#### GET /:code
Get room details by code.

**Response (200):** Room object

**Error (410):**
```json
{ "error": "Room is closed" }
```

#### POST /:code/join (Auth required)
Join a room.

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "message": "Joined successfully",
  "roomCode": "ABC123"
}
```

#### DELETE /:code (Auth required)
Close a room (creator or admin only).

**Response (200):**
```json
{ "message": "Room closed" }
```

---

### 📤 Upload Routes (`/api/upload`)

#### POST /image (Auth required)
Upload an image.

**Request:** `multipart/form-data`
- `file`: Image file (max 500MB)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/.../image.jpg",
  "publicId": "maiy-tech-hub/images/abc123",
  "width": 1920,
  "height": 1080
}
```

#### POST /video (Auth required)
Upload a video.

**Request:** `multipart/form-data`
- `file`: Video file (max 500MB)

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/.../video.mp4",
  "publicId": "maiy-tech-hub/videos/abc123",
  "duration": 120.5
}
```

---

### 👤 User Routes (`/api/users`)

#### GET /me (Auth required)
Get current user profile.

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "_id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d2",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "name": "User Name",
  "role": "USER",
  "avatar": "https://...",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}
```

#### PUT /me (Auth required)
Update current user profile.

**Request:**
```json
{
  "name": "New Name",
  "avatar": "https://new-avatar-url.com/..."
}
```

**Response (200):** Updated user object

#### GET /:id/public
Get public profile of a user.

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "id": "65f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d2",
  "name": "User Name",
  "avatar": "https://...",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "articlesCount": 5
}
```

---

## Health Check

#### GET /health
Check API health status.

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "timestamp": "2024-03-15T10:00:00.000Z"
}
```

---

## Status Codes

| Code | Description |
|------|-------------|
| 200 | Success |
| 201 | Created |
| 400 | Bad Request (validation error) |
| 401 | Unauthorized (invalid/missing token) |
| 403 | Forbidden (insufficient permissions) |
| 404 | Not Found |
| 410 | Gone (resource closed) |
| 500 | Internal Server Error |

---

## Rate Limiting

- **100 requests per minute** per IP
- Exceeded limit returns `429 Too Many Requests`

---

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description | Default |

#!/bin/bash

# MAIY Tech Hub Backend - Deployment Script
# Usage: ./scripts/deploy.sh [environment]
#
# Environments: production (default), staging

set -e

ENV=${1:-production}
PROJECT_DIR="/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/projects/maiy-tech-hub-be"
GIT_REPO="https://gitlab.com/maiy-hub/maiy-tech-hub-be"
GIT_BRANCH="main"

echo "🚀 Starting deployment to $ENV..."

# Color output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; exit 1; }

# Check if running as correct user
if [ "$ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$(whoami)" != "root" ]; then
    log_warn "Running as non-root user. Some operations may fail."
fi

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" || log_error "Cannot access project directory"

# Pull latest code
log_info "Pulling latest code from GitLab..."
git fetch origin "$GIT_BRANCH"
git checkout "$GIT_BRANCH"
git pull origin "$GIT_BRANCH"

# Install dependencies
log_info "Installing dependencies..."
npm ci --only=production

# Build TypeScript
log_info "Building TypeScript..."
npm run build

# Run seed (if needed)
if [ "$ENV" = "production" ]; then
    log_info "Running database seed..."
    npm run db:seed || log_warn "Seed failed or already seeded"
fi

# Restart PM2
log_info "Restarting PM2..."
if command -v pm2 &> /dev/null; then
    pm2 restart maiy-tech-hub-be || pm2 start dist/server.js --name maiy-tech-hub-be
    pm2 save
else
    log_warn "PM2 not found. Starting server manually..."
    node dist/server.js &
fi

# Health check
log_info "Running health check..."
sleep 3
HEALTH=$(curl -s http://localhost:4000/health || echo '{"status":"error"}')
if echo "$HEALTH" | grep -q "ok"; then
    log_info "✅ Deployment successful!"
    echo "$HEALTH"
else
    log_error "Health check failed. Server may not be running properly."
fi

# Show logs
log_info "Recent logs:"
pm2 logs maiy-tech-hub-be --lines 10 --nostream 2>/dev/null || echo "Logs not available"

echo ""
log_info "🎉 Deployment complete!"

# MAIY Tech Hub BE

Backend API cho MAIY Tech Hub — IT knowledge blog platform.

## Tech Stack

- **Runtime:** Node.js 22 + TypeScript
- **Framework:** Fastify v4
- **Database:** MongoDB 7 + Mongoose ODM
- **Auth:** JWT (access + refresh tokens)
- **File Upload:** Cloudinary
- **Validation:** Zod

- **Port:** 4000

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Setup environment

# Edit .env with your values

# Start MongoDB (Docker)
docker compose up -d mongodb

npm run db:seed
# Admin: admin@maiy.tech / maiy2026

# Run dev server
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build
npm start
```

## Development

```bash
# Watch mode
npm run dev

# Run tests
npm test

# Build
npm run build
```

## Docker

```bash
# Start all services
docker compose up -d

# View logs
docker compose logs -f backend

# Stop
docker compose down
```

## API Documentation

See [API.md](API.md) for full API documentation.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|---|---|---|

import mongoose, { Document, Schema } from 'mongoose'

export enum Category {
  AI = 'AI',
  CTDL = 'CTDL',
  WEB_DEV = 'WEB_DEV',
  DEVOPS = 'DEVOPS',
  MOBILE = 'MOBILE',
}

export interface IArticle extends Document {
  _id: mongoose.Types.ObjectId
  slug: string
  title: string
  excerpt: string
  content: string
  category: Category
  tags: string[]
  authorId: mongoose.Types.ObjectId
  coverImage?: string
  readingTime: number
  published: boolean
  publishedAt?: Date
  createdAt: Date
  updatedAt: Date
}

const articleSchema = new Schema<IArticle>(
  {
    slug: { type: String, required: true, unique: true },
    title: { type: String, required: true },
    excerpt: { type: String, required: true },
    content: { type: String, required: true },
    category: { type: String, enum: Object.values(Category), required: true },
    tags: [{ type: String }],
    authorId: { type: Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'User', required: true },
    coverImage: { type: String, default: null },
    readingTime: { type: Number, default: 5 },
    published: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    publishedAt: { type: Date, default: null },
  },
  { timestamps: true }
)

articleSchema.index({ title: 'text', excerpt: 'text' })

export const Article = mongoose.model<IArticle>('Article', articleSchema)

export { User, Role } from './User.js'
export { Article, Category } from './Article.js'
export { Comment } from './Comment.js'
export { Newsletter } from './Newsletter.js'
export { StudyRoom } from './StudyRoom.js'
export { RefreshToken } from './RefreshToken.js'

import mongoose from 'mongoose'
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
import dotenv from 'dotenv'
import { User, Role } from '../src/models/User.js'
import { Newsletter } from '../src/models/Newsletter.js'
import { RefreshToken } from '../src/models/RefreshToken.js'

dotenv.config({ path: '.env' })

const DATABASE_URL = process.env.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/maiy_tech_hub'

async function seed() {
  console.log('🔌 Connecting to MongoDB...')
  await mongoose.connect(DATABASE_URL)
  console.log('✅ Connected to MongoDB')

  // Clear existing data
  await User.deleteMany({})
  await Newsletter.deleteMany({})
  await RefreshToken.deleteMany({})
  console.log('🗑️  Cleared existing data')

  // Create admin user
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash('maiy2026', 12)

  const admin = await User.create({
    email: 'admin@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash,
    name: 'MAIY Admin',
    role: Role.ADMIN,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Admin user created: ${admin.email} (password: maiy2026)`)

  // Create test user
  const testUser = await User.create({
    email: 'test@maiy.tech',
    passwordHash: await bcrypt.hash('test1234', 12),
    name: 'Test User',
    role: Role.USER,
  })

  console.log(`✅ Test user created: ${testUser.email} (password: test1234)`)

  // Create test newsletter
  await Newsletter.create({ email: 'user@example.com' })
  console.log('✅ Test newsletter created')

  await mongoose.disconnect()
  console.log('🔌 Disconnected from MongoDB')
  console.log('🎉 Seeding complete!')
}

seed().catch((err) => {
  console.error('❌ Seeding failed:', err)
  process.exit(1)
})

#!/bin/bash

# MAIY Tech Hub Backend - Deployment Script
# Usage: ./scripts/deploy.sh [environment]
#
# Environments: production (default), staging

set -e

ENV=${1:-production}
PROJECT_DIR="/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/projects/maiy-tech-hub-be"
GIT_REPO="https://gitlab.com/maiy-hub/maiy-tech-hub-be"
GIT_BRANCH="main"

echo "🚀 Starting deployment to $ENV..."

# Color output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; exit 1; }

# Check if running as correct user
if [ "$ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$(whoami)" != "root" ]; then
    log_warn "Running as non-root user. Some operations may fail."
fi

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" || log_error "Cannot access project directory"

# Pull latest code
log_info "Pulling latest code from GitLab..."
git fetch origin "$GIT_BRANCH"
git checkout "$GIT_BRANCH"
git pull origin "$GIT_BRANCH"

# Install dependencies
log_info "Installing dependencies..."
npm ci --only=production

# Build TypeScript
log_info "Building TypeScript..."
npm run build

# Run seed (if needed)
if [ "$ENV" = "production" ]; then
    log_info "Running database seed..."
    npm run db:seed || log_warn "Seed failed or already seeded"
fi

# Restart PM2
log_info "Restarting PM2..."
if command -v pm2 &> /dev/null; then
    pm2 restart maiy-tech-hub-be || pm2 start dist/server.js --name maiy-tech-hub-be
    pm2 save
else
    log_warn "PM2 not found. Starting server manually..."
    node dist/server.js &
fi

# Health check
log_info "Running health check..."
sleep 3
HEALTH=$(curl -s http://localhost:4000/health || echo '{"status":"error"}')
if echo "$HEALTH" | grep -q "ok"; then
    log_info "✅ Deployment successful!"
    echo "$HEALTH"
else
    log_error "Health check failed. Server may not be running properly."
fi

# Show logs
log_info "Recent logs:"
pm2 logs maiy-tech-hub-be --lines 10 --nostream 2>/dev/null || echo "Logs not available"

echo ""
log_info "🎉 Deployment complete!"
